rationale: Van Heerde et al. (2013) is used for more than background: the citing paper explicitly positions its contribution against prior business-cycle research and names this study in that stream. The methods section also directly states it follows Van Heerde et al. in using CF-based cycle extraction and related modeling setup, indicating methodological carryover. The citing paper keeps the core question of how cycle conditions shape advertising and price effectiveness, but shifts to intrayear demand cycles and adds within-year action/effectiveness analyses.
relation_description: The citing paper extends Van Heerde et al. (2013) by moving the analysis of advertising and price effectiveness from multi-year business cycles to intrayear category demand cycles. It builds on parts of the prior methodological approach while adding new within-year elasticity and comovement results.
